title: Orage
writer: Marcel Achard, Henri Bernstein, Jan Lustig
actors: Charles Boyer, Michèle Morgan, Lisette Lanvin
plot: Orage is a 1938 French drama film directed by Marc Allégret. The screenplay was written by Marcel Achard and H.G. Lustig, based on play "Le venin" by Henri Bernstein. The films stars Charles Boyer and Michèle Morgan. It tells the ...
